title: chrysanthemum oresbium
intro: Chrysanthemum oresbium, also known as the Yellow Chrysanthemum, is a type of flowering plant that belongs to the daisy family. It is valued for its medicinal properties, particularly in traditional Chinese medicine, where it is used to treat fever, headaches, and digestive issues. The plant's health benefits include reducing inflammation, improving liver function, and boosting the immune system. Chrysanthemum oresbium can be prepared into various herbal preparations, such as teas, infusions, and tinctures, which are often used to treat a range of health conditions.
